name: loaded-triangle
prompt: Wide shot infirmary interior. Three women in frame — silver-haired woman LEFT near bed, brown-haired woman with glasses CENTER still flushed, platinum-haired nurse RIGHT at doorway. Medical equipment around them. Cool clinical lighting but pink warmth bleeding in. All three holding secrets. Loaded silence visible in composition. | anime style, modern anime aesthetic, clean linework, mature shading, dramatic lighting, high contrast, cel shading
